examples: The family is a microcosm of society.
Kitchell says the city was a microcosm of all American culture during the '60s.
Schools are not just a microcosm of society; they mediate it too.
The whole scene is, in a way, a microcosm of the contradictions this country faces.
The shout fest was, perhaps, a microcosm of what's become of our media and political dialogue.
